args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts

- Main exports or names: CreateHandlersInterface, createHandlers, typedFactory
- Reads as: TypeScript module with interfaces and factory functions for creating handlers
- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Safe summary: Factory helper provides generic handler creation with type support for 1-4 handlers

## src/helper/route/index.ts

- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Context utility for extracting matched routing information
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Safe summary: Route helper extracts path information from matched routes with caching

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts

- Main exports or names: WSContext, defineWebSocketHelper, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
- Reads as: WebSocket adapter with context and event handling types
- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts
- Safe summary: WebSocket helper defines upgrade handlers with event listeners support

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts

- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, generateCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: Cookie management functions with signed support and prefix options
- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Safe summary: Cookie helper provides set/get operations with __Secure and __Host prefix support

## src/helper/testing/index.ts

- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: Client generation function using hc for testing Hono apps
- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Safe summary: Testing helper creates test client with custom fetch for Hono application testing

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts

- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents, Runtime
- Reads as: Runtime detection with environment binding extraction
- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Safe summary: Adapter helper detects runtime (node/deno/bun/workerd/etc) and extracts bindings

## src/helper/css/index.ts

- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext, rawCssString
- Reads as: CSS-in-JS context with template literal support and class name generation
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts
- Safe summary: CSS helper provides styled components with hash-based class names and minification

## src/helper/css/common.ts

- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, buildStyleString, PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR
- Reads as: Shared CSS utility functions and type symbols
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Safe summary: CSS common module contains build and style generation with hash computation and minification

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts

- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: Proxy fetch wrapper with RFC 9110 compliance and hop-by-hop header handling
- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts
- Safe summary: Proxy helper fetches and transforms responses with header management

## src/helper/dev/index.ts

- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: Development tooling for route inspection and console output
- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Safe summary: Dev helper displays route information with colorization and name options

## src/helper/html/index.ts

- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: Template literal with escape/interpolate support for HTML strings
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Safe summary: HTML helper provides template literals with callback support for deferred rendering

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts

- Main exports or names: ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
- Reads as: Static site generation middleware exports from submodules
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Safe summary: SSG index re-exports static generation params, plugins, and context utilities

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts

- Main exports or names: toSSG, generateFileNames, fileExists
- Reads as: Main static site generation logic with FileSystemModule abstraction
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Safe summary: SSG core generates static pages by crawling routes and writing to file system

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts

- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: Path manipulation utilities for SSG route filtering
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Safe summary: SSG utils provide path joining and static route filtering with security checks

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts

- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
- Reads as: SSG context middleware for dynamic static generation
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Safe summary: SSG middleware adds params to requests and controls static generation context

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts

- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi
- Reads as: Streaming response utilities for large payloads
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Safe summary: Streaming index re-exports stream, SSE, and text streaming helpers

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts

- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
- Reads as: Base streaming response with TransformStream and context stashing
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Safe summary: Base stream helper handles chunked responses with error handling and abort support

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts

- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, writeSSE, SSEMessage
- Reads as: Server-Sent Events streaming with proper Content-Type and headers
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Safe summary: SSE helper writes event stream format with id/event/data/retry support

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts

- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: Text streaming wrapper with Content-Type and nosniff headers
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Safe summary: Text stream helper sets plain text headers on base stream

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Accept header parsing and matching utility
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Safe summary: Accepts helper parses Accept headers and matches supported content types

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts, defaultMatch, Accept, acceptsOptions
- Reads as: Accept header parser with custom matching support
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Safe summary: Accepts module parses quality values and matches against supported types

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts

- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, GetConnInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: Connection info type exports from types module
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Safe summary: ConnInfo index re-exports network information type definitions

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts

- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, GetConnInfo, AddressType, AddressType
- Reads as: Network connection type definitions with IPv4/IPv6 support
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Safe summary: ConnInfo types define remote address and transport information structures

## Simple Index
